---
name: Bug report
about: Something didn't work as expected
title: ''
labels: bug
---

**What happened**
A clear description of the bug.

**How to reproduce**
Which input (example / PMID / DOI / PDF / paste) and the steps.

**Expected**
What you expected instead.

**Environment**
- Running via: web app / CLI / hosted (studydiff.pharmatools.ai)
- Node version (if local):

**Notes**
If a specific paper extracted oddly, include the PMID/DOI (please don't paste copyrighted full text).
